use_cases: Primary action trigger for forms and CTAs
Secondary navigation and user interaction points
Icon-based action buttons for compact UI
ai_summary: A reusable button component with Radix UI Slot integration and class-variance-authority for flexible styling. Supports multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, small, large, icon). Implements standard accessibility patterns with focus-visible ring and disabled states. Ideal for any SaaS or web application requiring consistent button styling.
